name: FP AI Studio
category: AI image and video generation app
description: FP AI Studio is an all-in-one AI creative studio for Android. It generates images from text, creates videos with motion control, edits photos (upscale, relight, background and object removal, style transfer, image expand), and searches millions of stock assets, powered by 10+ AI models in a single app.
positioning: One Android app for AI image generation, AI video generation, AI photo editing, and stock search
10+ AI image and video models in one place
Mobile-first AI creative studio, no desktop required

features.name: AI Image Generation
facts: Controls for aspect ratio, guidance scale, and seed

features.name: Kling Motion Control
facts: Transfers motion from a reference video onto a character image

features.name: Stock Image Search
facts: Searches millions of stock photos, vectors, and illustrations from Freepik's library

features.name: Multi-Shot Scenes
facts: Up to 6 sequential video shots, each with its own prompt and duration

howItWorks: Enter a text prompt describing what you want to create
Choose an AI model suited to your style
Generate and download the result in high quality

answerEngineFaqs.a: FP AI Studio is an all-in-one AI creative studio app for Android that generates images from text, creates videos with motion control, edits photos, and searches stock assets using 10+ AI models.

answerEngineFaqs.q: What can FP AI Studio do?
answerEngineFaqs.a: It handles AI image generation, AI video generation, AI photo editing (upscale, relight, background and object removal, style transfer, image expand), and stock image search, all in one Android app.

answerEngineFaqs.q: Which AI models does FP AI Studio use?
answerEngineFaqs.a: Image models include Mystic, Flux 2 Pro, Flux 2 Turbo, Flux Dev, Seedream V4.5, and HyperFlux. Video models include Kling V3 Pro, Kling V3 Omni Pro, Kling 2.6 Motion Control, Luma Dream Machine, Minimax, and Wan-X.

answerEngineFaqs.q: What platform is FP AI Studio on?
answerEngineFaqs.a: FP AI Studio is an Android app.

answerEngineFaqs.q: How do I create an image with FP AI Studio?
answerEngineFaqs.a: Enter a text prompt, choose an AI model, and tap generate. The image is produced in seconds and can be downloaded in high quality.

answerEngineFaqs.q: Can FP AI Studio make a video from a photo?
answerEngineFaqs.a: Yes. It supports image-to-video and text-to-video with models like Kling, Luma, and Minimax, plus motion control and multi-shot scenes.
